name: NeilofNeils
title: NeilofNeils
description: A posts-only feed with no extra public sections pretending to be fuller than they are.
intro: A simple local publishing flow for posts, nothing else.
now: Keeping the publishing flow local, simple, and easy to use once real material starts moving in.
Running the public site as one posts feed instead of splitting attention across thin sections.
Cutting public fluff until there is enough material to earn anything beyond the feed.
